title: Intense Croatian Bread Bake
description: A fluffy, festive loaf infused with makrut lime leaves and double-risen for airy texture, ideal for diabetic-friendly gatherings.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine bread flour, instant yeast, sea salt, and dried makrut lime leaves.
Whisk warm water with honey, then pour into dry mixture.
Add olive oil and stir until shaggy dough forms.
Knead dough on floured surface for 8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place dough in greased bowl, cover, and let first rise for 30 minutes until doubled.
Punch down dough, shape into loaf, place on parchment-lined baking sheet, and sprinkle crushed lime leaves on top.
Cover loaf and let second rise for 20 minutes until puffed.
Preheat oven to 200°C, bake loaf for 30 minutes until golden and crusty, then cool on rack.
